summary: Tested Recipe Generator app end-to-end. Backend: 5/5 pytest tests pass (root, local recipe match for Aloo Jeera, AI fallback for global cuisine, empty ingredients 400, Gemini Nano Banana image generation). Frontend: all 11 requested flows verified on mobile viewport (390x844): home loads with correct title 'What's in your kitchen today?' and 'Ghar ka khana' eyebrow, cuisine toggle works (Indian default + Global), suggestion chip tap adds red chip, bulk comma input adds 2 chips, chip tap removes it, generate CTA navigates to /recipe with 'Aloo Jeera' (local), shows have list, shopping list with badge count (5), and numbered method steps, 'Try another recipe' returns to home.

integration_issues.issue: AI image (Gemini Nano Banana) takes 15-20s; the recipe page shows 'Plating your dish...' loader during this period. Page does not crash and falls back gracefully if request fails. Backend /api/recipes/image returns valid base64 in tests. Acceptable but UX may benefit from faster fallback or skeleton illustration.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warnings on web: 'shadow* style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow' and 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated'. Cosmetic only - does not affect functionality on native. Optional cleanup.

action_items: Optional: Address React Native Web console warnings about shadow* and pointerEvents deprecations.
Optional: Consider showing a static fallback hero image earlier (e.g., placeholder food image) while the Gemini image generates, to keep the first paint warmer.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: hybrid logic looks clean; LOCAL_RECIPES match requires >=2 core ingredient overlap which correctly triggers AI fallback for chicken/lemon/garlic/thyme.
Frontend uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL correctly via process.env.
All interactive elements expose appropriate testIDs.
seed_data_creation: None - app is stateless, no auth, no seeded data needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 11 features in this iteration verified passing. Pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_recipes.py covers local match, AI fallback, validation, and image generation. AI calls take ~3s for recipe and ~20s for image - use timeouts >=60s.
